'''Belsmuth II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Belsmuth system/Legends|Belsmuth system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It had an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] technical university which [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zsinj]] converted into a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] training academy. To confuse Zsinj as to the location of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] task force, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Nova Squadron]] assaulted the academy.

{{Planet-stub}}
